fields.label: Title
fields.description: Title of the task

fields.label: Due Date
fields.description: Timestamp that denotes when the task is due to be completed (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Owner Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user to whom the task is assigned. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Target Type
fields.description: Type of the entity for which the task is updated

fields.label: Target ID
fields.description: ID of the entity for which the task is created. The type of entity is selected in "Target Type".

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: creater_id, outcome_id, task_type_id)
